title: Voota FC downs Sedge United
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna-based side Voota FC's second team delivered an impressive performance in the KLFA lower division when they beat Sedge United (Sedgefield) 3-2 in a tough KLFA Domestic League encounter at Loerie Park in Knysna last weekend.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna-based side Voota FC's second team delivered an impressive performance in the KLFA lower division when they beat Sedge United (Sedgefield) 3-2 in a tough KLFA Domestic League encounter at Loerie Park in Knysna last weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Both sides are currently at the bottom half of the stream B log table. Sedge United has earned six points to date, while Voota FC is on seven points. Both teams have played nine games."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The first half ended on 1-1 after a goal by Vitumbiko Banda of Sedge United while Ivile Msele scored for Voota.","html":"The first half ended on 1-1 after a goal by Vitumbiko Banda of Sedge United while Ivile Msele scored for Voota."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A fast-paced second half saw both teams playing delightful passes from the centre of the field. Msele's second goal - from a set piece - made it 2-1, encouraging his wingers to push harder on the attack.","html":"A fast-paced second half saw both teams playing delightful passes from the centre of the field. Msele's second goal - from a set piece - made it 2-1, encouraging his wingers to push harder on the attack."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ayakhanya Manina extended Voota's lead to 3-1 after great footwork from the centre of the field.","html":"Ayakhanya Manina extended Voota's lead to 3-1 after great footwork from the centre of the field."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Sedgefield team came back into the game and managed to better their score when Banda netted their second goal in the dying moments of the game.","html":"The Sedgefield team came back into the game and managed to better their score when Banda netted their second goal in the dying moments of the game."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
